about_quotes.evidence: There’s the Roulette record... Live At Laren in Holland from seventy-nine with a New York band. Red Rodney, John Eckert, Jimmy Knepper, Sam Burtis, Ronnie Cuber, Bennie Aranov, Ray Drummond, and Billy Hart. [INTERVIEWEE] Yeah.
